name: codex-local-assistant
description: A local agentic coding assistant powered by the OpenAI Responses API (Codex).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
